title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail Consulting Pvt Ltd!
